showcase_presets.title: Baseline vs Fan Hot Stress
showcase_presets.description: Strong first demo: nominal behavior against a permanent fan power-stage loss under hot, low-airflow stress.

showcase_presets.title: Baseline vs Calibration Memory Corruption
showcase_presets.description: Computation/memory-path demo showing how a corrupted cooling target propagates into thermal and safety behavior.

showcase_presets.title: Baseline vs Stale Sensor Data Hot Stress
showcase_presets.description: Timing/communication-path demo showing stale coolant data under a stressed thermal operating condition.

showcase_presets.title: Stale Sensor Mild vs Stale Sensor Hot Stress
showcase_presets.description: Mild-versus-stressed timing comparison for explaining why operating context changes fault consequence.

showcase_presets.title: Baseline vs Paper Default
showcase_presets.description: Compact paper walkthrough comparing nominal behavior with the staged mixed-fault campaign.

showcase_presets.title: Multi-Fault Sequence vs Baseline
showcase_presets.description: Saved GUI multi-fault sequence for showing staged sensing and actuation faults without rerunning the simulator.
